payload.answer: Fetch failed (404 network error); do not store article content, only record the failure event.

entity_resolution.reason: Only a failing fetch status and a URL-like string were provided; no authoritative content or additional identifiers were available.

payload.intent: Store a memory card about an article intended for memory architecture, using the provided fetch failure result.

memory_cards.statement: An attempt to fetch the article at https://examplecom/missing failed with a 404 network error, so the article content was not retrieved.
Because the article content was not successfully fetched, no durable memory card about the article's information should be created from its contents.

details: Stored failure-event memory cards only; no article-content cards created.

repair_options: Retry fetching the correct URL (check punctuation/formatting and domain).
Provide the article text or a different working source link.
If the resource requires authentication or redirects, include cookies/headers or a final resolved URL.
